매일 새벽 손으로 직접 만드는 수제만두, 젊은 사장님에게서 느껴지는 '할머니의 손맛' 📍망원 연만두  (주소: 서울 마포구 망원로 77 1층 연만두)   🔗네이버 지도: https://naver.me/5Kb3ejlY   🥟만두 한 판 8,500원 / 왕치즈군만두 1개 2,500원   📦택배 신청: 매주 월요일 오후 5시까지 문자 접수 (연락처: 010-5941- 7816)   망원시장의 소문난 만두 맛집 '연만두'. 많은 분이 연세 지긋한 할머니가 운영하실 거라 오해할 만큼 깊은 손맛을 자랑하는 곳입니다. 하지만 이곳의 주인공은 만두에 인생을 건 젊은 사장님이었는데요.  그 깊은 맛의 비결은 진심어린 정성에 있었습니다.  "기계는 재료를 뭉개버린다"는 철학 아래, 매일 새벽부터 나와 모든 재료를 일일이 손으로 버무리고 직접 빚으시더라구요. 재료 하나하나의 식감이 살아있는 꽉 찬 만두 속은 그렇게 사장님의 고집으로 완성됩니다.  워낙 정성껏 소량만 준비하기 때문에 금세 품절되기로 유명한데요. 방문 전 전화 주문이나 네이버 예약을 이용하시면 헛걸음 없이 바로 가져가실 수 있으니 꼭 참고하세요!   주문 즉시 튀겨주시는 치즈 군만두는 갓 튀겨낸 바삭한 식감 속에 고소하게 늘어나는 치즈와 만두 속의 조화가 그야말로 환상적입니다.. 정성과 맛, 어느 하나 빠지지 않는 망원동의 진정한 인생 만두를 만나보세요!   - Deep flavor hand-mixed every dawn: Finding 'Grandmother's Touch' in a Young Master 📍망원 연만두 'Yeon-Mandu' (77, Mangwon-ro, Mapo-gu, Seoul, Republic of Korea)   🔗 https://maps.app.goo.gl/jDhS1Q11mVTn1mBA9   'Yeon-Mandu' is a renowned dumpling spot near Mangwon Market, famous for a deep, traditional flavor that leads many to assume an elderly grandmother must be running the shop. Surprisingly, the true master behind these dumplings is a young man who has dedicated his life to this craft.   The secret to such profound flavor lies in his sincere devotion. Following his philosophy that "machines crush the ingredients' texture," he starts his day in the early hours of the dawn, hand-mixing and folding every single dumpling. This stubborn commitment is what creates the perfect filling, where the texture of each ingredient remains intact and vibrant.   Because each dumpling is made with such meticulous care in limited quantities, they are famous for selling out quickly. We highly recommend placing a phone order or using Naver Reservation before your visit to ensure you don't miss out!  Don't miss the Cheese Fried Dumplings, fried to order for a perfectly crispy texture. The harmony of the savory, melting cheese and the rich dumpling filling is simply heavenly. Come and experience a true "life-changing" dumpling in Mangwon-dong, where passion and tradition meet! 🥟 #서울맛집 #망원동 #koreanfood #seoul #streetfood

Thick & Soft Bakery-Style Chocolate Chip Cookies 🍪  📖 Ingredients: Wet Ingredients * 1 cup (226g) cold unsalted butter, cut into cubes * 1 cup (184g) brown sugar * ½ cup (116g) granulated sugar * 2 tsp (32g) vanilla extract * 2 eggs (114g) Dry Ingredients * 4¼ cups (510g) all-purpose flour * 1 tsp (7g) baking soda * 1 tbsp (12g) cornflour * 1¼ tsp (12g) salt 1 cup chocolate chips  👩🏻‍🍳 Instructions: 1. Place the cold, diced butter into a stand mixer and beat briefly until it begins to soften and break into smaller pieces. 2. Add both sugars and continue mixing until the mixture looks light, creamy, and fully combined without noticeable chunks of butter. 3. Mix in the eggs and vanilla extract, pausing to scrape down the sides of the bowl to ensure everything is evenly incorporated. 4. In another bowl, combine the flour, baking soda, cornflour, and salt. Slowly add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring just until the dough comes together. Be careful not to overwork the dough. Add the chocolate chips and mix. 5. Divide the dough into large portions, roughly 100g each, and roll or shape them into tall balls to help create thick bakery-style cookies. 6. Cover the dough and place it in the freezer for a minimum of 1 hour before baking. 7. Bake at 375°F until the edges turn lightly golden while the centers remain soft, around 14–16 minutes. 8. Leave the cookies on the baking tray for 15–20 minutes after removing them from the oven so they can firm up while staying soft and chewy in the middle. Tips * For extra thick cookies, keep the dough very cold before baking. * Slightly underbaking the cookies helps keep the centers soft and gooey. * Use a cookie scoop or kitchen scale to keep all cookies the same size for even baking. * If the dough becomes too soft while shaping, chill it again for 10–15 minutes. * Sprinkle a little flaky salt on top after baking for extra flavor. #chocolatechipcookie #cookie #EasyRecipes #cookierecipes

Ooey-Gooey Scoopable Nutella Cookie Pie🤤 Yields: 15-16 Chunky Cookies INGREDIENTS:  230g Cold Chopped Unsalted Butter  160g Caster Sugar  160g Light Brown Sugar  450g Chocolate Chunks or chips  475g Plain Flour  1 tsp Salt 3 tsp Baking Powder  3/4 tsp Baking Soda  2 Eggs  1 Egg Yolk  1 tsp Vanilla  INSTRUCTIONS: •Cut cling wrap into small squares. Scoop ½ teaspoon Nutella onto individual cling-wrap squares. Fold to seal and freeze until solid. (Repeat for however many Nutella stuffed cookies you plan to make.) •In a large mixing bowl, add the cold cubed butter and whisk until slightly creamy. Add the white sugar and light brown sugar, then whisk together until well combined and fluffy. •Add the eggs, vanilla extract, and chocolate chips or chunks. Whisk until fully incorporated. •Add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Gently mix until just combined, do not overmix. •Portion the dough into 90g balls. Press a frozen Nutella piece into the centre of each dough ball, seal well, and roll into a smooth ball. •Place the stuffed cookie dough balls onto a tray and freeze for at least 30 minutes (or overnight for best results). •Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). •Take any shape baking dish circle, square, rectangle anything and line it with parchment paper. Arrange frozen cookie dough balls in it leaving some space between them. •Bake for 10-15 minutes (timing depends on the type of pan) or until the tops are lightly golden while the centres remain soft and gooey. •Remove from the oven and let cool slightly. •Serve warm with ice cream and chocolate sauce enjoy!✨ NOTE: Store any extra dough balls in an airtight container or freezer bag and freeze for later. Whenever a cookie craving hits, bake straight from frozen🫶🏻 #cookie #nutella #cookiepie #fyp #viral

Внешние факторы: Трение от рюкзаков, тесная синтетическая одежда и скопление пота после тренировок. Неправильный уход: Использование комедогенных (забивающих поры) средств для тела или недостаточное очищение кожи. Тот самый молочный ломтик 🤍 Нежный, мягкий и намного вкуснее магазинного. Буду благодарна за лайк🫶🏻 Ингредиенты: Бисквит: яйца - 4 шт сахар - 80 г мука - 70 г какао - 20 г разрыхлитель - 5 г растительное масло - 20 г мёд - 1 ст. л. щепотка соли Крем: сливки 33% - 100 г творожный сыр - 200 г сгущёнка - 80 г (смотрите по вашему вкусу, можно добавить чуть больше) желатин - 4 листа 220+ bloom (или 8г рассыпного) Пропитка: молоко - 40 г Приготовление: Яйца с сахаром и щепоткой соли взбиваем до пышной светлой массы. Добавляем мёд. Отдельно смешиваем муку, какао и разрыхлитель, просеиваем и в 2-3 этапа вводим в яичную массу. В конце вмешиваем масло. Выливаем на противень с пергаментом (обязательно смажьте его) тонким слоем и выпекаем при 175° 7-10 минут. Не пересушиваем. Остужаем и разрезаем на 2 части. Для крема желатин замачиваем. Сливки взбиваем до мягких пиков. Отдельно смешиваем творожный сыр и сгущёнку. Листы желатина хорошо отжимаем и растапливаем (я делала в микроволновке не больше 10 секунд) и быстро вмешиваем в сырную массу, затем вводим сливки. Первый корж слегка пропитываем, выкладываем крем, накрываем вторым коржом и убираем в холодильник минимум на 4 часа. Крем будет относительно жидкий, но стабилизируется.👌🏻 Важно: Желатин важно не перегреть, иначе он не сработает. Должен быть слегка тёплый, тогда он вводится легко и без комочков.  Приятного аппетита! #молочныйломтик #пирогрецепт #рецептпирога #рецепткчаю #тортрецепт
